properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every new day Your glory unfolds Filling my eyes with Your treasures untold The beauty of holiness brings worship anew My greatest love is You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Call me deeper into Your grace The river that flows from the Holy Place Wash over me, cleansing me through My greatest love is You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every new day Your glory unfolds Filling my eyes with Your treasures untold The beauty of holiness brings worship anew My greatest love is You, call me deeper

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Call me deeper into Your grace The river that flows from the Holy Place Wash over me, cleansing me through My greatest love is You, Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Wash over me, cleansing me through My greatest love is You Wash over me, cleansing me through My greatest love is You
